$comment: Single source of truth for Director Gabriel's projects. Loaded by Hermes at session start via skill `projects-registry`. Edit aliases to add search terms. Edit `path` to relocate. Run /projects-registry <name> to look up. Run /projects-registry list to enumerate.

projects.name: Hermes
projects.description: Hermes Agent — the AI agent runtime Hermes itself runs in. Persona (SOUL.md), skills (skills/), gateway, MCP, desktop GUI. AGUS-family agent Director Gabriel built.
memory_anchors: SOUL.md is the persona — edit with skill_manage discipline

projects.name: SunoSavvy
projects.description: Electron desktop app for managing a personal Suno music collection. Personal-use build phase; will be forked generically later. v3.4.0 ships Intel Hub (Lineage Forest + Mutation Engine + Body-of-Work).
memory_anchors: AGENTS.md bans re-debating the Suno-targeting decision

projects.name: JobbyJob
projects.description: Director's job-search workspace. Control-plane artifacts (task router, state snapshot, role playbooks, proof map) live here. Workspace mirror also exists under Development/.
memory_anchors: design system collateral: C:/Users/zerop/Development/JobbyJob Design System/

projects.name: VerbalChainsaw OpenCode
projects.description: Director's fork of opencode (github.com/VerbalChainsaw/opencode). Monorepo with packages/app (SolidJS renderer), packages/desktop (Electron shell), packages/opencode (HTTP API), packages/autogoal (plugin).
memory_anchors: AutoGoal lives in packages/autogoal/ — the retired sibling OpenGoal/ is FORBIDDEN

projects.name: dev-pulse
projects.description: Real-time local dev process dashboard. Native Qt window, tray-resident. Recently active (2026-07-01).

projects.name: ARGUS_OSINT
projects.description: ARGUS OSINT Evidence Workbench — privacy-aware OSINT investigation tool with VSCode integration, modular collector adapters, evidence preservation, claim graph, automated reporting.

projects.name: osint-console
projects.description: Companion OSINT tooling. Recently active.

projects.name: center-audit
projects.description: Evidence-gated, read-only, courtroom-disciplined root-cause audit skill for coding agents. v2.0.1 schema. Triplicated installs across skill roots.
memory_anchors: repair agent must re-validate audit invariant, not trust the repair contract

projects.name: center-geo
projects.description: CENTER-MULTIGEOMETRY — multi-geometry engine inside hermes-agent/apps/. Stage B+ shipped 2026-06-26/30: 2 engines wired (radial T09, cycle T10) plus anomaly/boundary. 290 tests.
memory_anchors: cycle engine critical fix: propagate low[popped] to parent.low in iterative Tarjan
path trap: dispatch subagent paths to C:/hermes/hermes-agent/, NOT home-agent

projects.name: poly-kalshi-dashboard
projects.description: Prediction-market analytics dashboard. Polymarket + Kalshi data, calibration, BTC drift study. Multiple iterations (v1, v2, v3).

projects.name: tessl-home-polish
projects.description: Tessl scratch project for home/landing polish work.

projects.name: tessl-smoke
projects.description: Tessl smoke test project. Pointer-only AGENTS.md (uses @.tessl/RULES.md) — Hermes does NOT dereference @-includes, so real Tessl context requires plain-English instructions or explicit file open.

projects.name: Claude
projects.description: Anthropic Claude projects workspace. Hosts Director's project artifacts (JobbyJob lives here). Treat as private control plane.

projects.name: ARGUS-Sentry
projects.description: ARGUS Sentry security surveillance system (per .claude/CLAUDE.md). Two cores: Surveillance (cameras/vision/events) and Agent (chat/model-routing/tools). HTTP server on port 4098 (loopback).
memory_anchors: lib/ is v2 complete; src/ is v3 partial migration in progress
